content_of_post_to_comment: I am going through a period of anger at the moment. Instead of fighting it or concluding there is something wrong with me, I am letting myself feel it. I am tightening up some boundaries like screws in a bike and I am taking a little time to be alone, to swim, to write.
comment: The bike metaphor made me wonder whether boundaries don't create distance so much as restore alignment. Anger seems to become corrosive mainly when it keeps trying to do a job that's already finished.
